---
title: 'catalog list'
---

## Synopsis

```bash
xorq catalog [OPTIONS] list [--kind/--no-kind]
```

## Description

List all entries in the catalog. Each line prints an entry's content-derived name.

## Options

`--kind / --no-kind`
: Show the expression kind (`Expr` or `UnboundExpr`) next to each entry name. Default: `--no-kind`.

## Related commands

`list-aliases`
: List all aliases in the catalog.

```bash
xorq catalog [OPTIONS] list-aliases
```

## Examples

```bash
# List entry names
xorq catalog --name my-catalog list

# List entries with kind
xorq catalog --name my-catalog list --kind

# List aliases
xorq catalog --name my-catalog list-aliases
```

## See also

- [catalog info](info.qmd)
- [catalog add](add.qmd)
